good_practices: • No visible pest infestation; pest control records available
• Medical fitness certificates of food handlers and water testing reports were available
• Cooking oil quality monitored regularly through TPC testing
• Food handlers maintained good personal hygiene
violations: • Oil leakage observed from kitchen equipment
• Crates used for storage were not cleaned properly
• Food testing reports and packaging records were not available
inspections.action_taken: 🛠️ Action Taken • Improvement Notice will be issued, and the Food Business Operator (FBO) has been instructed to rectify the identified deficiencies and ensure compliance with food safety standards.

violations: • Food stored in a non-functional freezer
• Rat infestation, rat burrows, and rodent damage to food packaging
• Rat droppings found in raw material and packaging storage areas
• Stale chicken biryani and spoiled vegetables stored in the freezer
• Egg mayonnaise stored under unsuitable conditions
• Medical fitness and pest control records not available
inspections.action_taken: 🛠️ Action Taken • FSSAI License Suspended • Directions issued for immediate rectification of all food safety violations • FBO instructed not to operate the premises until re-inspection and revocation of the suspension
